zh: 我需要去超市买一些东西。
en: I need to go to the supermarket to buy some things.

zh: 天气预报说明天会下雨。
en: The weather forecast says it will rain tomorrow.

zh: 我喜欢读书，因为它能让我学到很多东西。
en: I love reading books because it helps me learn a lot of things.

zh: 虽然天气很冷，但他们还是决定出去散步。
en: Although the weather was cold, they decided to go for a walk.

zh: 如果你努力学习，你就能通过考试。
en: If you study hard, you will be able to pass the exam.

zh: 她买了一件新裙子，然后去参加了朋友的生日派对。
en: She bought a new dress and then went to her friend's birthday party.

zh: 他不仅会说英语，还会说法语和西班牙语。
en: He can speak not only English but also French and Spanish.

zh: 尽管昨天天气非常恶劣，风雨交加，但他们还是决定按照原计划出发，因为他们不想让朋友们失望。
en: Although the weather was terrible yesterday with strong winds and heavy rain, they still decided to set off according to the original plan because they did not want to disappoint their friends.
